prose:
**Aniline frontier-orbital analysis** — Property: HOMO/LUMO energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy).

**Method / level of theory:** DFT, tier `standard` = **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** (density-fit RI is on by default in chemkit), computed in **PySCF** (program: pyscf). Restricted Kohn–Sham (closed-shell).

**Environment:** gas phase (solvent = null — no implicit solvation, no explicit solvent molecules).

**Charge / multiplicity:** charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell singlet), as requested.

**Geometry provenance:** single point on the user-supplied input geometry `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` (14 atoms: N, 6×C, 7×H). The geometry was used as-is; it was NOT re-optimized in this run.

**Convergence:** SCF converged = true, in 9 SCF cycles.

**Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV.**

Additional frontier-orbital results:
- HOMO (index 24) = −5.553772 eV
- LUMO (index 25) = −0.2489544 eV
- HOMO−1 = −6.8461949 eV; HOMO−2 = −8.4041702 eV
- LUMO+1 = +0.30750756 eV; LUMO+2 = +0.77617648 eV
- Total electronic energy = −287.71578 hartree (−7829.1453 eV; −180544.38 kcal/mol); energy zero = electronic energy (bare nuclei + electrons). n_orbitals = 259, n_occupied = 25.
- Koopmans-derived descriptors: vertical IP = 5.553772 eV, vertical EA = 0.2489544 eV, electronegativity = 2.9013632 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6524088 eV, chemical softness = 0.37701579 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.5868422 eV.

**Warnings:** the tool returned no warnings (empty — clean run).

**Integrity:** the engine reports integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = **true** (checks passed: energy_finite ✓, scf_converged ✓, schema_header ✓, schema_headline ✓).

**Reproducibility:** command = `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjqb3qr5q/live.json`. The result JSON was written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpjqb3qr5q/live.json`.

Note on scope: this is a semi-quantitative Koopmans-style orbital picture at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level; DFT frontier-orbital energies and gaps are known to be functional-dependent and are not rigorous excitation energies or ionization energies. No experimental or literature comparison is offered — ask if you want one and I will verify a source first.
